enforcement_boundary.storage_recommendation: Record the UTV2-853 enforcement timestamp in a migration record or system configuration table before hard-fail rules become active.
enforcement_boundary.historical_policy: Rows created before enforcement remain permanently UNKNOWN if model_registry_id is null.

hard_fail_rules.condition: Candidate scoring attempts to write model_score without model_registry_id after ownership columns exist and enforcement is active.
hard_fail_rules.action: Fail the scoring write; do not commit partial ownership.

hard_fail_rules.condition: model_registry_id does not reference an existing model_registry row.
hard_fail_rules.action: Fail via FK or repository validation.

hard_fail_rules.condition: Resolved registry owner is disabled or retired at scoring time.
hard_fail_rules.action: Reject scoring for that candidate; log ownership resolution failure.

hard_fail_rules.condition: pick_candidates.pick_id is set for a post-enforcement scanner/board candidate whose model_registry_id is null.
hard_fail_rules.action: Reject pick conversion or block model_generated classification, depending on future operator-approved enforcement boundary.

quarantine_rules.condition: A post-enforcement candidate-linked pick has null model_registry_id.
quarantine_rules.action: Classify ownership as UNKNOWN, quarantine from model-edge and syndicate analytics, count in attribution gaps.

quarantine_rules.condition: system-pick-scanner or board-construction pick has no pick_candidates join.
quarantine_rules.action: Classify ownership as UNKNOWN and quarantine from model-edge.

quarantine_rules.condition: Registry owner is degraded at scoring time.
quarantine_rules.action: Allow only if future standard permits degraded scoring; flag degraded-model-pick and exclude from syndicate.

warn_only_rules.condition: registry_entity_type, source_type_compatibility, active_state, or ownership metadata columns are absent before migration.
warn_only_rules.action: Warn and classify model ownership as UNKNOWN; do not fabricate a model entity type.

warn_only_rules.condition: scoring_run_id is null before runtime support for system_runs linkage exists.
ownership_timestamp is null before runtime support exists.
warn_only_rules.action: Warn and use candidate created_at only as a reporting proxy, not as ownership proof.

implementation_prerequisites: model_registry registry_entity_type/source_type_compatibility/owner metadata exists or warn-only compatibility behavior is explicitly accepted.
Runtime scoring write path updated to persist ownership with score fields.
Tests prove historical null ownership is preserved and post-enforcement null ownership is blocked or quarantined.
